answer:
The Ecwid MCP server is a standardized integration that allows AI agents, such as those in Claude, ChatGPT, or Cursor, to interact directly with your Ecwid store [1][2]. It uses the Model Context Protocol to expose store capabilities—such as searching products, auditing orders, managing customer profiles, and updating inventory—as executable tools [2][3].

You can connect your store using providers like viaSocket or Vinkius, which supply the necessary MCP endpoint and handle authentication [1][3]. These integrations allow you to manage your e-commerce operations using natural language without using the Ecwid control panel [2].

results.title: Ecwid MCP - Manage Store Inventory & Orders
How to Use Ecwid MCP Server with Mastra AI
